headline: Why Mercury Systems (MRCY) Is Up 8.9% After New SDA Tranche 3 Tracking Layer Win And What's Next
summary: L3Harris Technologies recently awarded Mercury Systems a contract to supply advanced, radiation-tolerant solid-state data recorders for the U.S. Space Development Agency’s Tranche 3 Tracking Layer satellites, expanding Mercury’s role across all four tranches of this missile-tracking constellation. This latest award, which shifts L3Harris to Mercury’s highest-capacity 3U VPX data recorder, underscores Mercury’s growing importance in secure, high-performance space-based sensing and data...
